nasb.text: For thus says the Lord, “The whole land shall be a desolation, Yet I will not execute a complete destruction.

esv.text: For thus says the Lord, “The whole land shall be a desolation; yet I will not make a full end.

cnv.text: 因為耶和華這樣說： “全國都必荒涼， 我卻不盡行毀滅。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“遍地将要荒凉， 然而不会被我彻底毁灭。
